capabilities.name: Architecture Review
capabilities.description: Evaluate whether layers are technically sound, separation of concerns is correct, components are over/under-engineered, and what should be merged or redesigned.
examples: Review a 6-layer AI platform for component independence
Identify over-engineered engines that should be merged
Assess whether a Digital Twin is realistic or a dictionary

capabilities.name: AI Design Review
capabilities.description: Determine whether reasoning, planning, decision, memory, and self-correction are real AI systems or keyword/template engines.
examples: Distinguish an LLM planner from a hardcoded phase template
Evaluate whether a memory system uses embeddings or keyword matching
Recommend replacing a custom reasoning engine with LangChain/LangGraph

capabilities.name: Odoo Implementation Review
capabilities.description: Assess whether a platform can implement, maintain, migrate, and operate real Odoo deployments across Enterprise, Community, OCA, and custom modules.
examples: Evaluate whether a platform can handle multi-company and localization
Check for real ORM introspection vs sample data
Assess upgrade automation beyond static breaking-change lists

capabilities.name: Scalability Review
capabilities.description: Identify bottlenecks under enterprise-scale assumptions and recommend backend, database, caching, and concurrency changes.
examples: Assess whether JSON file storage can survive 100 databases
Identify missing caching and indexing strategies
Recommend database replacement for in-memory graph storage

capabilities.name: Security Review
capabilities.description: Evaluate prompt injection, tool abuse, secrets management, credentials, database access, Git access, supply chain, plugin, and autonomous execution risks.
examples: Assess plugin loading for remote code execution risks
Check for absence of secrets management and audit logs
Review autonomous execution approval workflows

capabilities.name: Production Readiness Assessment
capabilities.description: Check observability, tracing, audit logs, rollback, versioning, disaster recovery, HA, backups, multi-tenancy, rate limiting, approvals, policy, and compliance.
examples: Score a platform on production readiness dimensions
Identify missing observability and rollback mechanisms
Recommend HA and backup strategies

capabilities.name: Competitive Analysis
capabilities.description: Compare platform capabilities against leading AI coding agents, Odoo tools, and enterprise platforms.
examples: Compare code generation capabilities against Copilot and Devin
Assess Odoo-specific differentiation vs Odoo Studio
Identify capabilities competitors have that the platform lacks

capabilities.name: Technical Debt Assessment
capabilities.description: Estimate architecture debt, maintenance cost, learning curve, operational cost, complexity, documentation burden, testing burden, and future scalability.
examples: Estimate maintenance cost of a 9,000-line stub codebase
Identify false-complexity from many empty engines
Assess test burden when tests verify mock data against itself

capabilities.name: Commercial Evaluation
capabilities.description: Assess market fit, differentiation, competitive advantage, business value, risk level, time to production, team size, and development time.
examples: Evaluate whether a platform can become a commercial SaaS
Estimate time to production and required team size
Assess investment risk level before funding
